languages.text: Укрепленные пласталью катакомбы, оборудованные всем необходимым для выживания. В них колонисты могут скрыться от нападений и катаклизмов, надеясь, что помощь придет прежде, чем кончатся рационы и кислород.

traits.locale_text: Укрепленные пласталью катакомбы, оборудованные всем необходимым для выживания. В них колонисты могут открыться от нападений и катаклизмов, надеясь, что помощь придет прежде, чем кончатся рационы и кислород.

Укрепленные пласталью катакомбы, оборудованные всем необходимым для выживания. В них колонисты могут скрыться от нападений и катаклизмов, надеясь, что помощь придет прежде, чем кончатся рационы и кислород.

languages.text: A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.
languages.original_text: Укрепленные пласталью катакомбы, оборудованные всем необходимым для выживания. В них колонисты могут скрыться от нападений и катаклизмов, надеясь, что помощь придет прежде, чем кончатся рационы и кислород.

traits.locale_text: A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. A colony might successfully sit out a pirate raid or a cataclysm, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations will inevitably run out.

A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. A colony might successfully sit out a pirate raid or a cataclysm, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations will inevitably run out.

A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.

A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.

languages.text: Ein Komplex von unterirdischen Gewölben, die mit Gusseisen verstärkt und mit allem ausgestattet sind, was man zum Überleben braucht. Die Kolonisten könnten einen Angriff oder mehrere Katastrophen erfolgreich abwarten, vorausgesetzt, dass Hilfe eintrifft, bevor die Vorräte an Sauerstoff und Rationen unweigerlich zu Ende gehen.
languages.original_text: A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.

traits.locale_text: Ein Komplex von unterirdischen Gewölben, die mit Gusseisen verstärkt und mit allem ausgestattet sind, was man zum Überleben braucht. Die Kolonisten könnten einen Angriff oder mehrere Katastrophen erfolgreich abwarten, vorausgesetzt, dass Hilfe eintrifft, bevor die Vorräte an Sauerstoff und Rationen unweigerlich zu Ende gehen.

languages.text: Un complexe de voûtes souterraines renforcées par du plasteel et équipées de tout ce qui est nécessaire à la survie. Les colons peuvent y attendre avec succès un assaut ou plusieurs calamités, à condition que les secours arrivent avant que les réserves d'oxygène et de rations ne s'épuisent inévitablement.
languages.original_text: A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.

traits.locale_text: Un complexe de voûtes souterraines renforcées par du plasteel et équipées de tout ce qui est nécessaire à la survie. Les colons peuvent y attendre avec succès un assaut ou plusieurs calamités, à condition que les secours arrivent avant que les réserves d'oxygène et de rations ne s'épuisent inévitablement.

languages.text: Un complejo de bóvedas subterráneas reforzadas con plasteel y equipadas con todo lo necesario para la supervivencia. Los colonos podrían esperar con éxito un asalto o varias calamidades, siempre que la ayuda llegue antes de que se agoten inevitablemente los suministros de oxígeno y raciones.
languages.original_text: A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.

traits.locale_text: Un complejo de bóvedas subterráneas reforzadas con plasteel y equipadas con todo lo necesario para la supervivencia. Los colonos podrían esperar con éxito un asalto o varias calamidades, siempre que la ayuda llegue antes de que se agoten inevitablemente los suministros de oxígeno y raciones.

languages.text: Plastelikle güçlendirilmiş ve hayatta kalmak için gereken her şeyle donatılmış bir yeraltı mahzenleri kompleksi. Kolonistler, oksijen ve erzak kaynakları kaçınılmaz olarak tükenmeden önce yardım gelmesi koşuluyla, bir saldırıyı veya birkaç felaketi başarıyla bekleyebilirler.
languages.original_text: A complex of underground vaults reinforced with plasteel and equipped with everything needed for survival. Colonists might successfully wait out an assault or several calamities, provided that helps arrives before the supplies of oxygen and rations inevitably run out.

traits.locale_text: Plastelikle güçlendirilmiş ve hayatta kalmak için gereken her şeyle donatılmış bir yeraltı mahzenleri kompleksi. Kolonistler, oksijen ve erzak kaynakları kaçınılmaz olarak tükenmeden önce yardım gelmesi koşuluyla, bir saldırıyı veya birkaç felaketi başarıyla bekleyebilirler.
